svg.title: Manim code generation internals
svg.desc: Flowchart showing scene specs entering a code generation stage, passing through syntax validation and a sandbox execution test, with a retry loop on failure up to a max attempt limit, falling back to template simplification or human escalation, and passing approved code to the rendering stage.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are in a per-scene visual specification?')
sendPrompt('How is the LLM prompted to generate Manim code?')
sendPrompt('How are scenes generated modularly — one per concept?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM handle LaTeX expressions in Manim?')
sendPrompt('What does syntax validation check for in generated Manim code?')
g.text: AST parse · import check · type hints

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the sandbox execution test work?')
sendPrompt('What error context is passed back to the LLM on retry?')
g.text: Error msg + traceback fed back to LLM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does template simplification do when code generation fails?')
g.text: Fall back to simpler scene type

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When does code generation escalate to a human?')
sendPrompt('How does the rendering stage consume the approved Manim scenes?')
